LoginPage.description: Sign in with Google to continue.

OnboardingPage.description: Select your photography interests so we can provide you the best experience.
OnboardingPage.interests_description: You can select as many as you like.
OnboardingPage.toast_error_user: User not found. Please sign in again.
OnboardingPage.toast_error_selection: Please select at least one interest.

AcademyPage.main_description: Take your photography knowledge from fundamentals to mastery.
AcademyPage.level_basic_description: Learn the basics of your camera, understand exposure, and master fundamental composition rules.
AcademyPage.level_intermediate_description: Shoot in different genres, apply advanced techniques, and consciously manage light.
AcademyPage.level_advanced_description: Create your own artistic style, learn professional lighting setups, and specialize in photography.
AcademyPage.tooltip_intermediate: Средний уровень — продолжайте развиваться, и он откроется.
AcademyPage.tooltip_advanced: Экспертный контент для продвинутого уровня. Продолжайте свое развитие, чтобы разблокировать.

AcademyLevelPage.practice_submission_description: Upload the photo you shot for this assignment and receive instant feedback.

AcademyLevelPage.toast_analysis_start_description: Preparing personalized feedback for your assignment.
AcademyLevelPage.toast_upload_fail_description: Your photo could not be stored. Please try again.
AcademyLevelPage.toast_feedback_ready_description: You can view the result below.

AcademyLevelPage.toast_mentor_description: Congratulations! As a Vexer, you can now mentor others.

DashboardPage.main_title: Я Лума. Я сопровождаю вас в вашем фото-путешествии.
DashboardPage.greeting_desc_1: We will improve your photos together.
DashboardPage.greeting_desc_2: I analyze light, composition, and technical details. I show your strengths and clearly state your weaknesses.
DashboardPage.greeting_cta: Здравствуйте, {name}. Если вы готовы, загрузите свою первую фотографию.

DashboardPage.toast_xp_gain_description: You earned {xp} XP for this analysis.
DashboardPage.toast_bonus_description: You earned +{xp} bonus XP for a high score!
DashboardPage.toast_mentor_description: Congratulations! As a Vexer, you can now mentor others.
DashboardPage.state_wait: This may take a moment, please wait.
DashboardPage.no_strengths: No specific strengths were identified in this photo, but it is a balanced shot overall.
